summary: This pipeline ingests the MySQL source table `agentichub.employees` (host 34.70.79.163:3306, instance verizon-data:us-central1:mysql-druid-metadatastore) into BigQuery dataset `verizon_data_dea` using a Cloud Composer 2 batch architecture with native Airflow operators and GCS staging. A one-time historical load DAG (`dag_5gcore_employees_historical_load`) performs a full extraction in configurable page-size chunks (default 100,000 rows) via `MySQLToGCSOperator`, writes CSV/Avro files to `gs://verizon-data-etl-staging/employees/` (1-day lifecycle), loads them into transient table `verizon_data_dea.employees_staging` via `GCSToBigQueryOperator` (WRITE_TRUNCATE), then executes BigQuery stored procedure `sp_mysqltobq_load` to MERGE on composite key `(employee_id, updated_date)` into the target table `verizon_data_dea.employees` (DAY-partitioned on `updated_date`, 60-day partition expiry, clustered on `employee_id`, `department_id`, `job_id`, `status`). Post-load SQL assertion tasks validate row-count reconciliation, composite PK uniqueness, and NOT NULL constraints. A formal sign-off gate (`historical_load_signoff_status = APPROVED` Airflow Variable) must be set before the daily incremental DAG (`dag_5gcore_employees_incremental_load`, cron `0 2 * * *`) activates; it applies a `WHERE updated_date > last_successful_run` watermark filter on each run and updates the watermark on success. An audit table `verizon_data_dea.pipeline_audit_log` receives an execution record on every DAG run regardless of outcome (trigger_rule=ALL_DONE). The 14-column mapping (source MySQL uppercase columns → lowercase BigQuery targets) includes CAST-based transformations and covers all 14 data rows from the mapping CSV.

store_proc.name: sp_mysqltobq_load
store_proc.description: BigQuery stored procedure in dataset verizon_data_dea that executes a MERGE from verizon_data_dea.employees_staging into verizon_data_dea.employees on composite merge key (employee_id, updated_date); WHEN MATCHED UPDATE all non-key columns; WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET INSERT all 15 columns

artifacts_to_generate.reason: CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE for verizon_data_dea.employees — 14 mapped columns plus partition on updated_date (DAY, 60-day expiry), clustering on employee_id/department_id/job_id/status
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE for verizon_data_dea.employees_staging — mirrors the 14 mapped columns, no partitioning or clustering; truncated and reloaded on every DAG execution
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE for verizon_data_dea.pipeline_audit_log with columns run_id, dag_id, execution_timestamp, status, rows_extracted, rows_loaded, error_message as specified in Phase 2 Step 3

BigQuery stored procedure implementing MERGE from employees_staging into employees on composite key (employee_id, updated_date) — WHEN MATCHED UPDATE non-key columns, WHEN NOT MATCHED INSERT all 14 mapped columns

Airflow DAG for one-time historical full load: schema_drift_check → extract_to_gcs → load_gcs_to_staging → run_merge_procedure → row_count_reconciliation → pk_uniqueness_check → null_constraint_check → write_audit_log (trigger_rule=ALL_DONE)

Airflow DAG for daily incremental load (cron 0 2 * * *): sign_off_gate → schema_drift_check → extract_incremental_to_gcs → load_gcs_to_staging → run_merge_procedure → row_count_reconciliation → pk_uniqueness_check → null_constraint_check → update_watermark → write_audit_log (trigger_rule=ALL_DONE)

patterns: Batch ELT — MySQL → GCS staging (1-day lifecycle) → BigQuery transient staging table (WRITE_TRUNCATE) → BigQuery MERGE stored procedure → partitioned/clustered target table
Incremental watermark via Airflow Variable last_successful_run (WHERE updated_date > last_successful_run)
Historical load sign-off gate via ShortCircuitOperator reading Airflow Variable historical_load_signoff_status = APPROVED
Schema drift detection via pre-load MySQL INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS diff against registered BigQuery schema
Post-load SQL assertions: row-count reconciliation, composite PK uniqueness, NOT NULL constraint enforcement
Chunked extraction: configurable page_size Airflow Variable (default 100,000 rows) with exponential backoff retry
Audit logging to verizon_data_dea.pipeline_audit_log on every execution (trigger_rule=ALL_DONE)
NULL partition handling: updated_date IS NULL rows land in __NULL__ partition
clarifying_questions: [IMPORTANT] Credentials / secret management — how are MySQL credentials for user `sa` provided at runtime (Airflow connection ID, Secret Manager, env vars)? → The document states username=sa and host/port but does not specify how the password or connection secret is stored or referenced by the MySQLToGCSOperator at runtime.

[IMPORTANT] Historical DAG schedule — is `dag_5gcore_employees_historical_load` schedule_interval set to `@once` or `None`, or triggered exclusively via manual trigger? → The document describes it as a one-time execution but does not explicitly state the Airflow schedule_interval value for this DAG.

[IMPORTANT] GCS staging file format — should `MySQLToGCSOperator` write CSV or Avro files to `gs://verizon-data-etl-staging/employees/`? → The document mentions both 'CSV/Avro' in several places but does not make a definitive selection between the two formats.
open_blockers: Stored Procedure Existence — Is `sp_mysqltobq_load.sql` already authored, tested, and available in a version-controlled repository, or does it need to be designed and implemented as part of this engagement? Its existence is assumed but not confirmed in the provided requirements.

Source Schema Confirmation — The exact column names, data types, nullable flags, approximate row count, and average row width of `agentichub.employees` have not been independently confirmed outside the mapping CSV; this information is required to configure the MySQLToGCSOperator schema parameter and establish the row-count reconciliation baseline.

PII Compliance Scope — Does the employee data require column-level BigQuery security policies, BigQuery data masking rules, or CMEK encryption beyond dataset-level IAM access control? The compliance field is currently null and the PII handling scope is unconfirmed.

connection_details.service: Cloud SQL MySQL — instance connection name

connection_details.env_var: sa password — storage mechanism unconfirmed; see clarifying question

logging_mechanisms.description: Execution outcome records written to verizon_data_dea.pipeline_audit_log on every DAG run (trigger_rule=ALL_DONE), capturing run_id, dag_id, execution_timestamp, status, rows_extracted, rows_loaded, error_message
Schema drift check task logs detailed column diff to Cloud Logging on mismatch; MySQLToGCSOperator chunk-by-chunk progress also observable via Cloud Logging as stated in Phase 5 Step 1

alerting_mechanisms.description: Cloud Monitoring dashboards used for operational pipeline health monitoring as referenced in Phase 5 Step 1, Phase 8 Step 2, and the architecture monitoring layer
